content:
English is often the key barrier to global expansion and career progression, especially when professionals can read and understand but struggle to speak fluently in real contexts.

## What you’ll learn
- Shift from passive understanding to active communication in English
- Build confidence in real workplace conversations
- Break through the final barrier to English fluency in professional settings

## Who it’s for
- Professionals aiming for international roles or career advancement
- Learners who can understand English but struggle with speaking
- Anyone looking to improve practical workplace communication
title: From Expansion to Integration
